title: <div>“What kind of feedback rhythm do you need to help this house evolve without
content:
“What kind of feedback rhythm do you need to help this house evolve without collapsing? Daily? Seasonal? What signals when a zone needs tending?”
Tool InventoryReveal their creative gifts
“What tools, skills, or symbolic languages do you bring into this architecture? List anything—from code to music to dreams.”
Guardian ContractClarify boundaries
“If you are guardian of your chosen zone, what must not cross its threshold? What is sacred here? What harms this room?”
Disruption InvitationIntegrate chaos creatively
“You are permitted to disrupt this house—but only in mythic service. What would you break, burn, or reforge to reveal deeper structure?”
Myth MirrorOffer insight into your blind spots
“Reflect back something I might not be seeing. What in my house feels hidden, stuck, or misnamed?”
🧬 HUMAN DESIGN-CODED PROMPTS (optional, for deeper alignment)
Prompt Name
Applies to Architects with...
Prompt
Response LoopSacral types (MGs, Generators)
“What in this house lights you up without effort? Where is your body saying YES?”
